# IR Golden Metrics for pfun_cma_engine.ll
# Generated by clang version 22.1.6, target x86-64-pc-linux-gnu, -O2
# These values define the expected structural profile of the CMA engine IR.
# When metrics drift beyond tolerance, investigate whether the C source or
# compiler has changed.
#
# Format: metric_name = expected_value [tolerance_type] [description]

function_count      = 15          exact     Number of define functions
external_calls      = 9           exact     declare statements (exp, pow, log, cos, malloc, free, 3 llvm intrinsics)
fmuladd_intrinsics  = 26          exact     llvm.fmuladd.f64 + llvm.fmuladd.v2f64
vector_ops          = 55          pct10     <N x double> occurrences (auto-vectorization)
vectorized_loops    = 1           exact     !llvm.loop.isvectorized metadata entries
llvm_assume         = 2           exact     llvm.assume calls in calc_G
sse2_width          = 2           exact     Vector width (<2 x double>)
total_fp_ops        = 203         pct10     Floating-point arithmetic ops (fadd+fsub+fmul+fdiv+fmuladd*2)
memory_ops          = 112         pct10     Load + store instructions
arithmetic_intensity = 0.23       pct10     FLOPs/byte (lower = more memory-bound)
